query:
SELECT 
  t.id, t.userId, t.status, t.errorMsg, 
  LEFT(t.message, 80) as message_preview,
  t.createdAt, t.completedAt,
  u.username
FROM openclaw_tasks t
LEFT JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id
WHERE t.createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY t.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 30;
command:

SELECT 
  t.id, t.userId, t.status, t.errorMsg, 
  LEFT(t.message, 80) as message_preview,
  t.createdAt, t.completedAt,
  u.username
FROM openclaw_tasks t
LEFT JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id
WHERE t.createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY t.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 30;
